name: Computer Science Engineering
description: Focus on AI, software development, algorithms, and computing systems.
tagline: Empowering Future Software Architects & AI Pioneers
about: The Department of Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) offers a cutting-edge curriculum focusing on advanced computing domains, practical software design, and futuristic AI tools. We prepare students for top-tier product and service companies globally.
learn: Master programming languages (Python, Java, C++), Data Structures & Algorithms, Full Stack Web Development (MERN), Deep Learning, Generative AI, and Cloud Infrastructure.
careers: Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer, Data Scientist, Devops Engineer, Cloud Architect, AI/ML Engineer, UI/UX Designer, QA Automation Engineer.

name: Electronics & Communication Engineering
description: Focus on internet of things, embedded systems, microcontrollers, and PCB prototyping.
tagline: Designing Smarter Connected Systems & Modern Hardware
about: The Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) bridges physical hardware with cloud automation. Learn embedded firmware, microcontroller operations, wireless network layers, and standard board routing layouts.
learn: Acquire expertise in Internet of Things (IoT), microcontrollers (ESP32, STM32, Arduino), sensor automation interfaces, embedded C/C++, and professional PCB design workflows using KiCad.
careers: Embedded Systems Engineer, VLSI Design Engineer, PCB Layout Designer, IoT Solutions Architect, RF Engineer, Robotics Systems Specialist, Firmware Developer.

name: Arts & Management
description: Focus on business analytics, product lifecycle management, ERP systems, and modern digital tools.
tagline: Building Modern Managers and Data-Driven Leaders
about: The Arts & Management department focuses on merging digital technology with commercial operations. Master advanced project coordination pipelines, analytical tools, enterprise ERP systems, and workplace productivity strategies.
learn: Explore Product Management using AI, HR Management & Talent Analytics, SAP & ERP system modules, statistical data visualization methods, and digital business tools.
careers: Product Manager, Business Analyst, HR Analytics Specialist, ERP Consultant, Operations Manager, Brand Strategist, Project Manager, Financial Analyst.
